scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high && npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:fix -w server && npm run lint:fix -w client
